message:
feat(text-effects): add ParticleDissolve effect (bd-31q3)

Add particle dissolve/materialize text effect with:
- DissolveMode enum: Dissolve, Materialize, Explode, Implode
- TextEffect::ParticleDissolve variant with progress, mode, speed, gravity, seed
- Particle character selection based on drift distance
- Color inheritance from effect chain
- Position offset calculation with gravity support
- Deterministic particle paths via seed

9 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria.

Also fixes pre-existing type ambiguity issues in radial gradient tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
